# Fra-Ber Tex Interior Cleaning Foam Upholstery & Leather Cleaner 600ml

357.00
EGP 

357.00
EGP 

[
![image](https://elhuria.com/uploads/admindFSnSGghszANJYz91z88JAMBulSpw9ufuD47QFPjlogo.jpg)
](https://elhuria.com/en/brand/119-fra-ber)

SKU: 
1126317

- 
Type : Fra-Ber Tex Interior Cleaning Foam Upholstery & Leather Cleaner 600ml

- 
Brands : Fra-Ber

- 
Origin : Italy

- 
Category : Car care chemicals

- 
Code : 1126317

Italian car interior upholstery cleaner characterized by effective foam that cleans and brightens fabrics, carpets, Alcantara and fabrics.
Thanks to its special high-foaming formula, it effectively cleans carpets, wallpaper and fabric surfaces without leaving any residue.
It dries in a short time on the treated parts, leaving a pleasant scent.
Shake well before use. Spray the product from a distance of about 20 cm.
Then wipe the treated area with a clean cloth and wait for it to dry.
Dilution rate: The package is in the form of a spray, do not dilute.
